products.title: Products
products.archive_desc: This changes the product status and removes it from default active lists.
products.no_permission: You do not have permission to perform this action.
products.list_note: Loads 50 products per page (newest first). With search, up to 50 matches per page are ordered by closest match (barcode, SKU, name). Use filters, then Previous / Next between pages.
products.attributes_empty: No dynamic fields are defined for this primary category yet.
products.tags_empty: No other categories available to tag.
products.sku_auto_hint: SKU is generated automatically when you save.
products.image_hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Maximum size 2 MB.
products.image_invalid_type: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.

tax.title: Taxes
tax.future_hint: A future tax engine will manage tags and automatic calculation. The current value is kept until then.
tax.empty_defs: No tax definitions yet. Create them under Catalog → Taxes.

products.barcode_on_variants_hint: Barcodes are managed per variant on the Attributes & variants tab.

axes.hint: Add a row per attribute (e.g. color, size) and pick values for this product. All combinations are generated on save.
axes.draft_preview: {{count}} variants will be generated when you save the product.
axes.draft_simple: No attributes: one default variant is created on save.

variants.title: Product variants
variants.hint: Edit barcode and SKU per variant after generation.
variants.no_axes: Enable «Use for variant generation» and link a catalog attribute on the category page.
variants.save_product_first: Save the product first, then generate variants.
variants.grid_empty: No variants yet. Add axes and click Generate.

products.tags_help: You can select additional categories when the product belongs to more than one category.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.archive_confirm: Deactivate this definition? It will not be offered for new product links.

field.name: Name
field.rate_hint: Example: 0.15 means 15% on the tax-exclusive amount.

categories.title: Categories
categories.browse_lead: Browse categories by level. Click a card to open its subcategories.
categories.browse_tree_hint: Tip: use breadcrumbs to go back up.
categories.detail_children_lead: Direct child categories under this category.
categories.image_hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP. Maximum size 2 MB.
categories.image_invalid_type: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WebP image.
categories.attr_preset_key_fixed_hint: The technical key is fixed for the selected property.
categories.attr_select_needs_options: Add at least one option for a single-choice field.
categories.attr_use_for_variants_hint: Values come from the attribute catalog, not free text on the product.
categories.attr_catalog_values_hint: Add values (Red, Blue…) on the product form or under Catalog → Product attributes.
categories.attr_catalog_link_required: Link a catalog attribute when variant generation is enabled.
categories.attr_inherited_hint: Edit or remove these on the parent category. Child-only attributes stay on this category.
categories.attr_delete_desc: Products keep existing values in their data, but this field will no longer be validated or shown for this category.
categories.variant_axes_moved: Variant axes are configured per product under

globalAttributes.title: Product attributes
globalAttributes.lead: Global dictionary for variant axes (color, size, …). Staff pick values on each product; use this page to clean duplicates.
globalAttributes.empty: No attributes yet. Create one, then add values (Red, S, …).
globalAttributes.merge_desc: All products and variants using the selected duplicates will point to the canonical value.
